\\cite.description: Insert a citation. In TeXFlow, use [@key] in paragraph text instead — the serializer converts it to \cite{key} automatically.

\\textcite.description: Textual citation: author name in running text with year in parentheses. e.g. 'Smith (2024) argues...'

\\parencite.description: Parenthetical citation: full citation in parentheses. e.g. '(Smith 2024, p. 42)'

\\autocite.description: Context-sensitive citation: adapts to the bibliography style (footnote in verbose styles, parenthetical in authoryear).

\\fullcite.description: Print the full bibliography entry inline in running text.

\\nocite.description: Include an entry in the bibliography without citing it in the text. Use \nocite{*} to include all entries.

\\printbibliography.description: Print the bibliography. In TeXFlow, this is added automatically when bibliography entries exist.

\\addbibresource.description: Declare a .bib file to use. In TeXFlow, this is handled automatically — use document(action='bib_add') to add entries.
